display.purpose: Hero statement only — staggered letters, Dogstudio-style.

label.purpose: Section labels, tags, nav meta — uppercase tracked.

motion.name: ease-out-expo
motion.purpose: Default easing for hovers, reveals, and hero-rise.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Button hovers, nav color, arrow nudge.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Moss CTA — hero and inline actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.875rem 1.5rem; background: oklch(0.4 0.087 160); color: oklch(0.08 0 0); font-family: 'Bricolage Grotesque', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.9375rem; letter-spacing: 0.02em; border: none; border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: background 180ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), transform 180ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.52 0.11 160); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.52 0.11 160); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Contact Button
components.description: Large moss CTA for contact panel.
components.css: .ds-btn-contact { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 1rem 2rem; background: oklch(0.4 0.087 160); color: oklch(0.08 0 0); font-family: 'Bricolage Grotesque', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1rem; text-decoration: none; white-space: nowrap; border-radius: 0; transition: background 180ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), transform 180ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-contact:hover { background: oklch(0.52 0.11 160); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-contact:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.52 0.11 160); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Nav Link
components.css: .ds-nav-link { font-family: 'Bricolage Grotesque', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: lowercase; color: oklch(0.93 0 0); text-decoration: none; transition: color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: oklch(0.52 0.11 160); } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.52 0.11 160); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Section Label
components.description: Uppercase moss section kicker — one per section max.
components.css: .ds-section-label { margin: 0; font-family: 'Bricolage Grotesque', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; color: oklch(0.4 0.087 160); }

components.name: Project Row
components.description: Full-width immersive project link — not a card grid.
components.html:
01
Bar & Restaurante

Oishi Adrenalina

Site para restaurante e bar japonês em Piraju.

↗
components.css: .ds-project-row { display: grid; gap: 1.5rem; padding: 2.5rem 1rem; text-decoration: none; color: oklch(0.93 0 0); border-top: 1px solid oklch(0.22 0.01 160); transition: background 420ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), padding-inline 420ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-project-row:hover { background: oklch(0.15 0.005 160); padding-inline: 2rem; } .ds-project-index { font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: oklch(0.4 0.087 160); } .ds-project-tag { display: block; margin-bottom: 1rem; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: oklch(0.72 0.02 160); } .ds-project-title { margin: 0 0 0.5rem; font-size: clamp(2rem, 6vw, 4rem); font-weight: 800; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.03em; } .ds-project-desc { margin: 0; max-width: 48ch; color: oklch(0.72 0.02 160); line-height: 1.65; } .ds-project-arrow { font-size: 1.5rem; color: oklch(0.4 0.087 160); align-self: center; transition: transform 180ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-project-row:hover .ds-project-arrow { transform: translate(4px, -4px); } .ds-project-row:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.52 0.11 160); outline-offset: 3px; }

narrative.overview: Portfólio de André Mendes onde superfície escura é palco e o craft é o espetáculo. Inspirado em Dogstudio: tipografia display como statement, trabalhos como lista imersiva, voz confiante. Acento verde-musgo pontual; personalidade na tipografia e no motion.
keyCharacteristics: Void canvas oklch(0.08 0 0) — palco escuro sem tint quente
Moss signal raro — único acento saturado
Bricolage Grotesque única — hierarquia por peso
Display hero com letras separadas e stagger
Lista de projetos full-width, zero card grid
Flat surfaces; profundidade por tonal layering

rules.name: The ≤10% Rule
rules.body: Moss saturado nunca domina a viewport. Um CTA por zona, acento em detalhes — raridade é o ponto.

rules.name: The Pure Void Rule
rules.body: Fundo chroma 0. Personalidade vem do acento e da tipografia, não de cream no body.

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: Bricolage Grotesque carrega tudo. Sem pairing serif+sans.

rules.name: The Dogstudio Display Rule
rules.body: Hero é tipografia coreografada — letras separadas, hero-rise stagger 35ms/letra.

rules.name: The Flat-Until-Interaction Rule
rules.body: Superfícies planas em repouso. Hover muda tom ou posição — nunca ghost-card.

dos: Do usar void canvas com moss em ≤10% da superfície
Do coreografar hero por letra e reveals no scroll — conteúdo visível sem JS
Do lista imersiva de projetos — full-width rows, não card grid
donts: Don't usar SaaS clichê: grids de cards idênticos, hero-metric, gradientes decorativos
Don't cair no visual feito por IA: cream/sand, glassmorphism, eyebrows em todas as seções
Don't parecer clone Linear/Vercel dark sem alma
Don't usar border 1px + box-shadow blur ≥16px no mesmo elemento
